LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS JOHN PALMER, AS TRUSTEE OF THE PALMER FAMILY MILLENIUM, JOHN PALMER, AMY PALMER AND MONTGOMERY PARTNERS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS HAVE SHOWN NO DUTY OWED TO PLAINTIFF TO MAKE A SAFE PASSAGE TO USE THE RAILING TOPS TO GET TO HIS APARTMENT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUEGG, PAUL TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT JOHN PALMER,TRUSTEE OF THE PALMER FAMILY MILLENIUM  III TRUST PALMER, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL PALMER, AMY AN INDIVIDUAL MONTGOMERY PARTNERS ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $11,260.48 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,260.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
